zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Baskerville於大約1387年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾易亞迪斯利時，他的父親Sir Richard Baskerville , Baron of Eardisley15歲，母親Joan Everingham26歲。他於1407年與Joan Brydges在英國英格蘭賀福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年在英國英格蘭賀福爾享年29歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾金頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Baskerville于大约1387年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾易亞迪斯利时，他的父亲Sir Richard Baskerville , Baron of Eardisley15岁，母亲Joan Everingham26岁。他于1407年与Joan Brydges在英国英格兰賀福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年在英国英格兰賀福爾享年29岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾金頓。

nameMeanings.name: Baskerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Boscherville in Eure, France, named with Old Anglo-Norman French boschet ‘copse, thicket’ (a diminutive of Bois ) + ville ‘settlement, town’.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Baskerville was born about 1387, in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Baskerville , Baron of Eardisley, was 15 and his mother, Joan Everingham, was 26. He married Joan Brydges in 1407, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1415, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29, and was buried in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Baskerville est né environ 1387, à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Baskerville , Baron of Eardisley, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Joan Everingham, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joan Brydges en 1407, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1415, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Kington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Baskerville um 1387 in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Baskerville , Baron of Eardisley 15 und seine Mutter Joan Everingham 26. Er hat 1407 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Brydges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1415 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Baskerville è nato il circa 1387 nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Baskerville , Baron of Eardisley, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Joan Everingham, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Joan Brydges nel 1407, nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1415, nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Kington, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Baskervilleが約1387年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Baskerville , Baron of Eardisleyは15歳，母Joan Everinghamは26歳であった。1407年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでJoan Brydgesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで29歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Baskerville(이)가 대략 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Baskerville , Baron of Eardisley(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Everingham(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1407년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 Joan Brydges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 킨그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Baskerville nasceu aproximadamente 1387, em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Baskerville , Baron of Eardisley, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Joan Everingham, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Brydges em 1407, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1415, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Baskerville родился около 1387 г. в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Baskerville , Baron of Eardisley было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Everingham, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Brydges в 1407 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1415 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности кингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Baskerville nació aproximadamente 1387, en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Baskerville , Baron of Eardisley, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Joan Everingham, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Joan Brydges en 1407, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1415, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
